name: Reliance on Cookies without Validation and Integrity Checking
description: The application relies on cookie values for security-critical operations without verifying their integrity or that the cookie belongs to the associated user. Attackers can easily manipulate cookies to escalate privileges or bypass access controls.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node (cookie data from client) flows directly to AUTH or CONTROL decision nodes without a TRANSFORM node that validates integrity (e.g., HMAC, digital signature). The application trusts client-supplied cookie values for authorization decisions.
